title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM B-343.12, FOR MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, PAGE ONE HUNDRED SIXTY-A, TITLE B, APPENDIX A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6807 / 53 OG No. 17, 5521 (September 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1777, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM B-343.12, FOR MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, PAGE ONE HUNDRED SIXTY-A, TITLE B, APPENDIX A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and Home of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item B-343.12, for Mountain Province, page one hundred sixty-A, title B, appendix A of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is hereby amended to read as follows:

"B-343.12: Balaoa-Cagubatan via Mayag Road Construction .................. GR : 5 : 5 : 5 : : : : : : : 1 :"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
